title: Day Counter Plus
description: Day Counter Plus isn’t just a simple day counter – it’s a fully re-imagined way to display your world’s progress, with live updates, stunning visual effects, and in-game customization.
body:
![Day Counter Plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85987a1d1943c8a63f2943b48aa9e85ad99510f7_0.webp)

### 🕒 Day Counter Plus – The Enhanced Day Tracker

Day Counter Plus isn’t just a simple day counter – it’s a fully re-imagined way to display your world’s progress, with live updates, stunning visual effects, and in-game customization.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5975201c42c62fbb478322f3575f0fc68368fc2.webp)
### ✨ Features
Live Day Display
Always shows your current world day (DAY X) directly on your screen.
Updates in real time as the sun rises and sets.
Clean and minimal – no commands or extra steps needed.
🎨 Unique Visual Effects

**Bring your day counter to life with effects you won’t find in any other mod:**

- 🌈 Rainbow – Smooth cycling through colors of the rainbow.
- 🌊 Wave – Characters move up and down like ocean waves.
- 🌟 Fade – Text fades in and out dynamically.
- 📏 Growing – Letters pulse, scaling up and down continuously.
- ✍️ Outline & Shadow – Add borders or soft shadows for clarity, even with fading effects.

![Rainbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747c51767759a6ff4a121b08392412e3ccef4c4d.gif)
![Wave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db8f4835697bd830aadd5312e6fbfb0bbbc5a8a.gif)
![Fade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d86d45c965f417fa23d0cf004c03979d260c3511.gif)
![Growing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eacd87cf8ed32f3179f429b371094755a4a532c.gif)
![all](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3018958bf7fc0f40ee4d8cfcc21a6d16af12f15f.gif)

> 👉 The best part? All effects render live, smoothly animating right on your HUD with no lag.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5975201c42c62fbb478322f3575f0fc68368fc2.webp)

### ⚙️ Full In-Game Customization

![Customization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44da8059712376ab6ef5d7234b538aa46a70187b.gif)

> An intuitive settings menu (GUI) lets you tweak everything while you play:

1. Adjust position (X/Y).
1. Scale the text size.
1. Customize colors and transparency.
1. Enable/disable individual effects.
1. Configure shadow strength and offsets.
1. Reset each section to defaults anytime.

All settings are saved to a config file and load automatically every session.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5975201c42c62fbb478322f3575f0fc68368fc2.webp)

### 🚀 Why Day Counter Plus?
-  More than just a counter – it’s a stylish HUD element for your survival journey.
-  Works standalone, with no extra libraries required.
-  Lightweight and performance-friendly.
-  Packed with visual polish and features no other day counter mod offers.
